summary: Excellent soundboard capture praised for Charlie Miller's work
review: The recording is a soundboard (SBD) source captured by Charlie Miller and has earned enthusiastic appreciation from the reviewer. While no specific musical details are mentioned, the five‑star rating indicates both high recording quality and an overall positive impression of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Single glowing 5‑star review with no detailed critique; reviewer thanks the engineer, implying excellent recording quality and a favorable view of the performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer expresses gratitude to Charlie Miller, suggesting clear and well‑mixed audio; no issues are cited.
